name: laabu-kiq-document-intelligence
description: Intelligent document ingestion for the organisational knowledge base. Automatically analyses document content, suggests metadata tags (category, type, keywords), confirms accessibility scope, and ingests the document into the RAG corpus with full provenance tracking. Supports organisation-wide, department-restricted, and personal-private scopes.

skills.name: Document Analysis
skills.description: AI-powered analysis of document content using Gemini to extract category, type, topic, keywords, and suggested accessibility scope. Always run before uploading.

input.filename: Original filename for extension-based type inference

output.doc_category: High-level category: contract, financial, technical, hr_policy, marketing, …
output.doc_type: Fine-grained type: sow, invoice, spec, meeting_notes, report, …
output.suggested_departments: Departments most likely to need this document
output.analysis_summary: Human-readable summary for presenting to user

examples: Analyse this sales contract before uploading
What type of document is this and who should access it?
Suggest metadata tags for this technical specification

skills.name: Upload Document to Knowledge Base
skills.description: Upload a document with full metadata tagging: provenance (source agent), category, type, keywords, and accessibility scope. Supports inline text, Google Drive URLs, and GCS URIs. Supports personal scope for per-user private documents.

input.display_name: Friendly document name shown in search results
input.source: Google Drive URL or GCS URI (alternative to extracted_text)
input.source_agent: Agent or system that triggered this upload (e.g. personal_assistant)
input.departments: Comma-separated dept names when scope = department
input.owner_user_id: User ID when scope = personal (the owning user)

output.tags_applied: Full metadata tags applied to the document

examples: Upload this Q3 revenue report — accessible to finance and executive only
Index this engineering spec for the whole organisation
Store this personal note — only accessible by me

skills.name: List Knowledge Base Documents
skills.description: List uploaded documents with optional filters by scope, department, or source agent.

input.filter_source_agent: Source agent name to filter by (optional)

output.documents: List of documents with name, scope, and department tags

examples: Show all documents uploaded by the CRM agent
List documents accessible to the sales department
What documents are in the organisational knowledge base?
